options.name: -accumulated
options.description: Run comparision for accumulated Budgeting mode

options.name: -add_ons
options.description: Specify the supplement model that can be additionally loaded, while loading the blocks

options.name: -cells
options.description: List of cell names for which sdc comparison is to be done. Default: All cells

options.name: -chip
options.description: TCL file which loads chip database

options.name: -compare_only
options.description: Will just compare the already dumped data from the previous run

options.name: -master_only
options.description: Dumps and compares constraints for checking only the master partitions for the master-clone designs. In case this parameter is not used, the tool dumps and compares constraints taking clones also in consideration.

options.name: -module_model_tag
options.description: Module model tag for the cell on which sdc comparison is to be done.

options.name: -no_top
options.description: No checking for TOP cell would be done

options.name: -out_dir
options.description: directory where validation comparison reports and log files will be output. Default: ./cps

options.name: -overwrite_tag
options.description: Regenerate the design for accumulated Budgeting mode
